capacity_evidence.explanation: At the preserved batch of 32, one [batch,32768,23040] bf16 MLP buffer is 45 GiB; gate, up, and product buffers alone require 135 GiB before residuals, weights, and allocator overhead. The supplied compiler graph therefore captures a 128-token cache for this single-device functional baseline.

notes: The optimized decoder preserves the IR-translated 128-token contract; this is not a reduced Falcon3 architecture limit. BFP8 KV storage and internally chunked dense MLP execution reduce memory. The selected DRAM-sharded decode path persistently owns width-sharded decode copies of QKV/O/gate/up/down in addition to interleaved prefill weights; max-length 128 prefill was rerun after that selection and remains valid, so this stage neither extends nor reduces advertised capacity.
